title: Hydrogen Storage and Carriers
caption: Parameter study for Hydrogen Storage and Carriers.
description: The chapter parameter study converts stationary and transport hydrogen storage plus carrier value chains into a small sweep with visible KPIs: stored kg H2, volumetric and gravimetric density, reconversion energy penalty, round-trip efficiency, and boil-off or release risk. The values are screening outputs intended to demonstrate the notebook structure and discussion pattern.
discussion: The parameter study shows how stationary and transport hydrogen storage plus carrier value chains responds when the controlling parameter changes. The important result is not a single base-case value; it is the shape of the response and the point where stored kg H2, volumetric and gravimetric density, reconversion energy penalty, round-trip efficiency, and boil-off or release risk begin to trade against margin or cost.
calculation_basis: Chapter-specific screening calculations for stationary and transport hydrogen storage plus carrier value chains, normalized to the KPIs: stored kg H2, volumetric and gravimetric density, reconversion energy penalty, round-trip efficiency, and boil-off or release risk.
study_basis: IEA hydrogen route context and the cited process-design references define the interpretation envelope for the normalized indices.
source_labels: IEA Global Hydrogen Review 2023, Chemical engineering design reference
